32.kj: anvil, corner, foot(-step), going, (hundred-) fold, [idiom] now, (this) [phrase] once, order, rank, step, [phrase] thrice, (often-), second, this, two) time(-s), twice, wheel.

32.gl: to glow or grow warm; figuratively (usually) to blaze up, of anger, zeal, jealousy
32.kj: be angry, burn, be displeased, [idiom] earnestly, fret self, grieve, be (wax) hot, be incensed, kindle, [idiom] very, be wroth. See H8474 (תַּחָרָה).

32.gl: 'I pray', 'now', or 'then'; added mostly to verbs (in the Imperative or Future), or to interjections, occasionally to an adverb or conjunction
32.kj: I beseech (pray) thee (you), go to, now, oh.
32.dv: a primitive particle of incitement and entreaty, which may usually be rendered;

33.gl: to turn back (hence, away) transitively or intransitively, literally or figuratively (not necessarily with the idea of return to the starting point); generally to retreat; often adverbial, again
33.kj: ((break, build, circumcise, dig, do anything, do evil, feed, lay down, lie down, lodge, make, rejoice, send, take, weep)) [idiom] again, (cause to) answer ([phrase] again), [idiom]

33.gl: to walk (literally or figuratively); causatively, to carry (in various senses)
33.kj: [idiom] again, away, bear, bring, carry (away), come (away), depart, flow, [phrase] follow(-ing), get (away, hence, him), (cause to, made) go (away, -ing, -ne, one's way, out), gro

33.gl: to end, whether intransitive (to cease, be finished, perish) or transitived (to complete, prepare, consume)
33.kj: accomplish, cease, consume (away), determine, destroy (utterly), be (when... were) done, (be an) end (of), expire, (cause to) fail, faint, finish, fulfil, [idiom] fully, [idiom] ha

33.gl: perhaps properly, to arrange; but used figuratively (of words), to speak; rarely (in a destructive sense) to subdue
33.kj: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), ut

33.gl: properly, a standing, i.e. a spot; but used widely of a locality (general or specific); also (figuratively) of a condition (of body or mind)
33.kj: country, [idiom] home, [idiom] open, place, room, space, [idiom] whither(-soever).
33.dv: or מָקֹם; also (feminine) מְקוֹמָה; or מְקֹמָה; from H6965 (קוּם);

33.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
33.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
